description_long: This stool features a round, dark brown cushioned seat, likely upholstered in leather or faux leather, providing a comfortable sitting surface. The seat is supported by four elegantly curved wooden legs, which are connected by two circular wooden support rings, one near the top and one closer to the base, enhancing stability and structural integrity. The wood appears to have a natural finish, showcasing its grain and adding a touch of warmth to the overall design. The stool lacks a backrest, giving it a minimalist and versatile appearance suitable for bars, counters, or communal urban spaces. The footrest ring is positioned at a comfortable height for resting feet, making it practical for extended use. The overall design is simple yet refined, with no visible decorative embellishments, emphasizing function and understated style.
description: A round, dark brown cushioned stool with four curved wooden legs and two circular support rings, including a footrest. The design is minimalist and functional, with a natural wood finish and no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the round cushioned seat, four wooden legs, and both circular support rings clearly visible.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the curvature of the legs and the alignment of the support rings.
description_view_2: Side view emphasizing the thickness of the seat cushion and the symmetry of the leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Another angled view similar to view 1, showing the seat and leg structure with a focus on the footrest ring.
